title: pronephrium diminutum
intro: Pronephrium diminutum, also known as the Diminutive Cinnamon Fern or Pronephrium, is a species of fern native to Sri Lanka. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pronephrium diminutum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Pronephrium diminutum can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is often used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions.
